## Summary

Describe the focused change and why it is needed.

## Security impact

Explain whether this changes detection coverage, fail-closed behavior, hook input handling, or user confirmation.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `tests/danger-gate-smoke.ps1`.
- [ ] I checked PowerShell syntax.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for detection-rule changes.
- [ ] I removed credentials, private paths, production data, and unrelated changes.

## Documentation

List the documentation updated by this change, or explain why no documentation change is required.
